events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: PVC flue slope back-pitched (condensing furnace). This is a safety hazard because condensate can pool in the flue, potentially blocking venting and causing combustion gases (including CO) to spill into the living space. Back-pitched vent is non-compliant per IRC M1801 and NFPA 54 which require vents to slope upward toward the termination.
